Interface ISeamlineModifierInit

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control initialization of a seamline modifier.

[Guid("EDB2353C-3627-41BC-85C1-7436F98F3C21")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISeamlineModifierInit

Properties

MosaicDataset

The mosaic dataset for which seamlines are being computed.

IMosaicDataset MosaicDataset { get; set; }

Property Value

IMosaicDataset
